scripts.og: npx @arach/og og-template.html -o public/og.png --var 'tag=Multi-App Canvas Workspace' --var 'title=HUDSON' --var 'titleSize=88px' --var 'subtitle=Build apps with Provider + Slots + Hooks. Compose them into spatial workspaces.' && npx @arach/og og-releases-template.html -o public/og-releases.png --var 'pageTitle=Releases' --var 'subtitle=Download the latest version. Code-signed and notarized by Apple.' && npx @arach/og og-demo-template.html -o public/og-demo.png --var 'pageTitle=Demo' --var 'subtitle=See Hudson in action. A multi-app canvas workspace for React.'
